artifacts.summary: 5-phase implementation plan for extracting supervised training data via Lean proof step extraction, Python schema extension, ingestion pipeline, and augmentation to 10-20K steps

memory_candidates.content: In the BimodalLogic proof system, DerivationTree is defined as a Type (not Prop), which means Lean preserves constructor applications at compile time. This allows extractStepSequence to pattern-match on the 7 constructors and emit step-level data, unlike Prop-valued proofs which are erased. The existing walkDerivationTree function in DataExport.lean provides the canonical pattern for recursive tree traversal with accumulation. Theorems in Theories/Bimodal/Theorems/ use tactic mode ('by') but produce the same term-level DerivationTree values as term-mode definitions, so they are equally extractable.
